title: Horror MC Lite
description: A horror‑focused modpack featuring smarter undead, paranormal events, forest stalkers, cave predators, and phobia‑based creatures. The world becomes darker, reactive, and relentlessly dangerous.
body:
Step into a world where every biome hides a threat, every cave echoes with something alive, and every shadow feels deliberate.  
This modpack delivers a meticulously curated horror experience, combining psychological tension, hostile environments, and intelligent predators that adapt to your presence.
 Core Features

    Advanced undead behavior powered by Zombie Awareness:
    mobs track sound, scent, and blood, turning nighttime into a relentless hunt.

    Grotesque anomalies and paranormal encounters from The Box of Horrors:
    unpredictable manifestations and entities that defy natural law.

 Environmental Horror

    From The Fog introduces a chilling, atmospheric presence that stalks players across the world.

    Creeping Woods transforms forests into oppressive, living ecosystems where movement is never truly safe.

 Subterranean Threats

    Better Cave Dweller populates underground spaces with intelligent, lurking predators designed to ambush and overwhelm.
    Caves become claustrophobic, unpredictable, and deeply unsettling.

 Phobias Turned Real

    Arthropod Phobia Expansions + Horror Bosses adds nightmarish insectoid creatures and high‑intensity boss encounters that push survival to its limits.

    Arachnophobia introduces hyper‑realistic, aggressive spiders designed to trigger genuine tension and discomfort.
